Home → Discography → Heaven'z Movie

Heaven'z Movie

1998 · Ruthless Records

Gold

#3 Billboard 200

Bizzy Bone's solo debut exploded onto the charts at #3 on the Billboard 200, selling 130,000 copies in its first week. A raw, eclectic take on Bone Thugs-N-Harmony's R&B-laced rap formula with deep autobiography and fire-and-brimstone spirituality. The album includes some of Bizzy Bone's most iconic tracks to date, including “Thugs Cry“ and “Nobody Can Stop Me“, while other tracks “Marchin' on Washington“, “Roll Call“, “Yes Yes Y'all“ and “Brain on Drugs“ were cut short due to sample clearances not being made on time. Produced in part by Bizzy himself under the alias B.B. Gambini, alongside Johnny 'J'. Certified Gold by the RIAA.

"Talk to the walkin' dead, crossroads, call on the Rev., lost souls."

— Demons Surround Me
01 Roll Call produced by Nina & B.B. Gambini —
02 Thugz Cry produced by Johnny J & B.B. Gambini ▷
03 Marchin' On Washington produced by Mafisto & B.B. Gambini —
04 Yes Yes Y'all produced by Johnny J & B.B. Gambini ▷
05 Menensky Mobbin' produced by Mike Smoov & B.B. Gambini ▷
06 Waitin' for Warfare produced by Eric 'E' Nordquist & B.B. Gambini feat. Capo ▷
07 Mr. Majesty II produced by Mike Smoov & B.B. Gambini feat. Maje$ty —
08 Brain on Drugs produced by Mike Johnson, Mafisto & B.B. Gambini —
09 On the Freeway produced by Cat Cody & B.B. Gambini feat. Cat Cody ▷
10 Demons Surround Me produced by Mike Smoov & B.B. Gambini ▷
11 (The Roof Is) On Fire produced by Mike Smoov & B.B. Gambini ▷
12 Nobody Can Stop Me produced by Johnny J & B.B. Gambini ▷
13 Social Studies produced by Mafisto & B.B. Gambini —
